summary: Tested City/State geo-fencing features for ShowMeLive. 11/12 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working correctly after fixing a response parsing bug.

minor.issue: Route ordering conflict - /events/{event_id} catches /events/locations before it reaches the actual endpoint. Returns 404 with 'Event not found'
minor.fix: Move /events/locations route definition before /events/{event_id} in server.py

integration_issues.issue: Frontend was using response.data instead of response.data.events for search results

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/events/search/location with no params returns all events
Backend: GET /api/events/search/location?city=Los filters by city
Backend: GET /api/events/search/location?state=CA filters by state
Backend: GET /api/events/search/location?city=San&state=CA filters by both
Backend: POST /api/events creates event with geo fields (city, state, lat, lon, geo_restricted, geo_radius_meters)
Backend: POST /api/events creates event without geo restriction
Backend: POST /api/events/{id}/check-geo returns 'allowed: true' for non-restricted events
Backend: POST /api/events/{id}/check-geo returns 'allowed: true' for user within 1000m radius
Backend: POST /api/events/{id}/check-geo returns 'allowed: false' for user outside radius
Backend: POST /api/events/{id}/check-geo requires location when no coordinates provided
Backend: POST /api/events/{id}/check-geo returns 404 for non-existent event
Frontend: Home page loads with MapPin location search toggle button
Frontend: Clicking MapPin opens search panel with City input and State dropdown
Frontend: Search by city/state calls /api/events/search/location endpoint
Frontend: Search results display 'Showing X events in [location]' indicator
Frontend: Clear search button resets filters and shows all events
Frontend: CreateEvent page has geo-fencing toggle switch
Frontend: Enabling geo-fencing shows City input and State dropdown
Frontend: 'Verify Location' button geocodes city/state using Nominatim API
Frontend: After verification, shows coordinates and confirmation message
action_items: Fix route ordering: Move /events/locations endpoint before /events/{event_id} in server.py (line 2485 should be before line 499)
critical_code_review_comments: Route ordering in FastAPI: Static routes like /events/locations must be defined before dynamic routes like /events/{event_id}
Frontend response parsing was incorrect - fixed to use response.data.events
seed_data_creation: Created test events with geo-fencing (San Francisco, CA with coordinates 37.7749, -122.4194)
context_for_next_testing_agent: City/State geo-fencing uses Nominatim (OpenStreetMap) for geocoding. The check-geo endpoint uses haversine formula to calculate distance. Default geo_radius_meters is 1000m. The /events/locations endpoint has a route ordering bug.
